creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
FLAVOR was used for these splits.
However, /usr/src/sys/conf/kern.post.mk does not currently have a way to add FLAVOR to the port specified in PORTS_MODULES.
Thereby, it is not possible to rebuild the module at the same time as the kernel.

The split by FLAVOR is not clear, and the following ports must be installed on the following board.

board:
# pciconf -l -v | grep --before-context=3 --after-context=1 --regexp=display
vgapci0@pci0:1:0:0:     class=0x030000 card=0x23111787 chip=0x67791002 rev=0x00 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. [AMD/ATI]'
    device     = 'Caicos [Radeon HD 6450/7450/8450 / R5 230 OEM]'
    class      = display
    subclass   = VGA

kldstat with gpu-firmware-kmod-g20210330:
 6    1 0xffffffff8272c000   15b6f0 radeonkms.ko
 7    2 0xffffffff82888000    78e90 drm.ko
 8    4 0xffffffff82901000    13f30 linuxkpi_gplv2.ko
 9    2 0xffffffff82915000      6d0 debugfs.ko
10    1 0xffffffff82916000     f9c1 ttm.ko
11    1 0xffffffff82926000     1307 radeon_CAICOS_pfp_bin.ko
12    1 0xffffffff82928000     1705 radeon_CAICOS_me_bin.ko
13    1 0xffffffff8292a000      d81 radeon_BTC_rlc_bin.ko
14    1 0xffffffff8292b000     5fa5 radeon_CAICOS_mc_bin.ko
15    1 0xffffffff82931000     6147 radeon_CAICOS_smc_bin.ko
16    1 0xffffffff82938000    322a3 radeon_SUMO_uvd_bin.ko

gpu-firmware*-kmod-20211014 that must be installed:
graphics/gpu-firmware-radeon-kmod@btc
graphics/gpu-firmware-radeon-kmod@caicos
graphics/gpu-firmware-radeon-kmod@sumo
